prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: 2D battle VFX texture for a Pokemon-style grass attack
Primary request: create a soft pollen haze residue layer for a grass impact burst
Scene/backdrop: transparent background, isolated effect only, no background
Subject: effect only, no Pokemon body, no arena, no UI
Style/medium: premium polished game VFX asset with a clean organic haze and soft particulate bloom
Composition/framing: diffuse cloud with floating pollen specks, centered and compositing-friendly, transparent alpha
Lighting/mood: light, airy, lingering impact residue
Color palette: pale green-gold pollen, translucent emerald mist, subdued forest-green traces
Materials/textures: soft smoke-like botanical haze, tiny drifting particles, gentle glow, clean edges
Constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no environment, no card frame
Avoid: heavy smoke, fire shapes, beams, trails, black background, checkerboard, solid backdrop, hard outlines
Important negative constraints: keep the haze subtle and readable, make it support the bloom rather than replace it, avoid a weather fog look
